## Overview

Harvest is a US-headquartered (New York) time tracking and invoicing platform widely used by consultancies, agencies, and professional services firms. Strengths are the time-to-invoice flow, native integration with Xero and QuickBooks, and a clean UI optimised for daily time entry. Recommended for ArcKit Consulting v1 on the basis of best-in-class consultancy time tracking + invoicing experience and direct integration with the recommended Xero / FreeAgent accounting path.

## Products & Services

- **Harvest (Free)** — limited (1 user, 2 projects); useful only for evaluation.
- **Harvest Pro** — $11/user/month annual ($13.75 monthly); unlimited users / projects, time tracking, invoicing, reporting, integrations.
- **Harvest Teams** — $9/user/month annual; team plan for larger organisations.
- **Harvest Forecast** — capacity planning and resourcing add-on, sold separately.

## Pricing Model

- **Per-seat subscription** with published list prices.
- **Free tier** of limited utility (1 user); the Pro tier at $11/user/month annual is the realistic entry point.
- Annual billing offers ~20% discount vs monthly.
- Indicative cost at 10 users on Pro annual: $110/month ≈ £85/month ≈ £1,020/year.

## UK Government Presence

- G-Cloud listed: Unknown (not directly listed under "Harvest" brand at the search performed; some resellers may list).
- DOS listed: No.
- UK data centres: No (US-hosted; UK GDPR Article 28 DPA available; sub-processor list published).

## Strengths

- **Best-in-class consultancy time-to-invoice flow** — daily time entry → weekly review → monthly invoice generation in one tool.
- **Native Xero and QuickBooks integration** — invoices created in Harvest sync to the accounting system automatically.
- **Mature** product (founded 2006); stable feature set; well-known to consultancies.
- **Clean UI** — low training overhead for consultants.
- **Mobile apps** — iOS and Android, supporting field consultancy work.
- **Reporting** — utilisation, billable percentage, project margin reporting out of the box, supporting BR-004 and FR-007.

## Weaknesses

- **US-hosted** — UK GDPR Article 28 DPA needed; some buyers may prefer EU-hosted (Clockify is EU-hosted).
- **No advanced project management** — not a substitute for resource management at scale; Harvest Forecast is a separate add-on.
- **Subscription cost** at 10+ users adds up; cheaper alternatives exist (Clockify Standard at $5.49/user/month).
- **Less feature-rich** than enterprise PSA platforms (Kantata / Mavenlink / OpenAir); Harvest is consultancy-friendly, not enterprise PSA.
